warnings.description: 56/65 products use FDC generic type references rather than scanned panels. Sugar values are type-anchored, not SKU-specific.
warnings.resolution: Accepted — Israeli juice brands are under-represented in OFF. FDC references are appropriate directional anchors. All stamped candidate.

warnings.description: 1 product (7290006696717, מיץ מוסקט אפרת) misrouted to 'dessert' by engine. Score 57.4/C.
warnings.resolution: Accepted — score is plausible. Product annotated in frontend with routing_flag. Engine anchor for 'מוסקט' is a known gap; flagged for future router update.

warnings.description: 3 cold-pressed products score 54-57/C despite NOVA 1. Cold-press process does not reduce sugar content; the engine correctly weights sugar over processing class for beverages.
warnings.resolution: Valid finding — confirmed expected behavior. Consumer insight: cold-press improves processing profile but does not change sugar load.

warnings.description: Fresh-squeezed סחוט תפוזים 1 (barcode 7290003009640) scores 85/A — sole A in category. This product has NOVA 1 assignment from OFF + lower FDC sugar reference (7.6g vs 8.4g typical OJ).
warnings.resolution: Score verified against trace. The A is driven by NOVA 1 (minimal processing) + calorie density well within beverage table tier 1. Directionally correct.
